dependencies.name: basu
dependencies.fallback: Ubuntu CI uses the API-compatible libsystemd sd-bus provider; one build links exactly one provider.
dependencies.reason: The Experimental supervisor directly uses the selected system sd-bus provider for bounded settings-service readiness before starting the shell. Gentoo selects basu.

dependencies.name: dbus
dependencies.reason: The Experimental supervisor requires an inherited session-bus address and confirms settings readiness on that bus. Isolated tests exercise the same contract with dbus-run-session.

dependencies.name: libxcb
dependencies.reason: The Experimental supervisor directly consumes the internal X11 adapter to reject an unusable selected display before launching session components.

unresolved.reason: The exact installed Gentoo basu, D-Bus, and libxcb boundary is measured, but supported minimum versions remain unmeasured.

PD1 inherits a validated session bus. Harness-owned isolated bus startup and teardown remain open; exact-child post-exec shell readiness and the standard X11 session entry are implemented without an additional runtime dependency.
